response.justification: Maria has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal team management at an executive level, and her German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong track record of mentoring and conducting technical workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project leadership
Lacks clear experience in client advisory, compliance, or risk management contexts
